name: balanced
description: Balanced critic profile for mobile-only HITL contexts. Critic must operate without expecting same-turn author follow-through. REQUEST_CHANGES requires explicit re-submission cycle. Use during fragmented-attention windows.
notes: Stricter than lenient because the user cannot do deep-dive review of REQUEST_CHANGES resolutions during fragmented-attention windows. Major findings escalate to REJECT to force a clean re-submission rather than risk a mobile-approved fix that wasn't fully evaluated. Smaller max diff size encourages more granular changes when bandwidth is limited.
